summary: When a new lead lands, research them against your corpus and draft a personalized follow-up for your approval.

definition.name: Lead follow-up drafter
definition.description: On every new lead: scout enriches the lead from the tenant corpus and CRM, then nadia drafts a personalized outreach email. Drafts only — every send waits in Greenlight for a human.

greenlight.note: Outreach drafts from this playbook reference the originating lead.
